title: Personal User - update for headset is present
scenario: Firmware update prompt appears on Home Screen for connected Poly device with outdated firmware, and tapping update completes DFU successfully
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device with outdated firmware is connected.
3. Observe the Home screen for a firmware update notification or banner indicating that a firmware update is available for the connected device.
4. Tap the update button or notification to initiate the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
5. Follow any on-screen prompts to proceed with the firmware update.
6. Wait for the DFU process to complete without interruption.
7. After completion, verify that the device firmware version has been updated to the latest version in the Device Settings screen.
expected: A firmware update notification/banner is displayed on the Home screen for the connected Poly device with outdated firmware. Tapping the update button successfully initiates and completes the DFU process, and the device firmware version is updated to the latest version.
